title: schelhammeria cyperoides
intro: Schelhammeria cyperoides, also known as the jointed twinevine, is a type of plant that belongs to the Schelhammeria genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating coughs. In herbal preparations, Schelhammeria cyperoides is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to help relieve respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
